description: Style Notecatwalk perfects the spring's aesthetic just right with this simplistically designed pair. This simple flats elevates your casual staples to give them a refined polish. Versatile enough to be worn with ethnic kurtis and denims and tees.Product DetailsCriss-crossing beaded brown straps across the forefoot and midfoot, culminates at the heel collarHas a buckled ankle strap and a soft printed footbedTPU outsole with branded grooves at the forefoot and a floral lug at the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
